meta.description: Receives Gitea system webhook events at POST /webhook/gitea-events and posts a formatted Mattermost message for push, PR opened/closed/merged/reopened, PR review (approve/reject), issue opened/closed/reopened, issue comments, releases, branch/tag create, repo create/delete, and forks. To wire up: in Gitea as admin, Site Administration → Webhooks → Add Webhook (Gitea). URL: http://n8n:5678/webhook/gitea-events. HTTP Method: POST. Content Type: application/json. Trigger On: 'Send Everything' (or pick specific events). Active: yes. Default destination channel is town-square — edit the Mattermost node's channelId to route elsewhere.
